feed.title: Sharan Sajiv Menon
feed.subtitle: This is my personal blog. I will be writing lots of posts on programming and mathematics.

entry.title: Welcome to Jekyll!
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog. This is my first post and I will be adding more posts soon. Check the about page if you want to learn more about me.

That’s it for now and I will see you later

Bye!
entry.summary: Welcome to my blog. This is my first post and I will be adding more posts soon. Check the about page if you want to learn more about me.
